content: @Mike Rossiter : Dave has updated api-17/ocpn-plugin.h. Before we merge this into opencpn-libs, we need it tested. IIRC, you have one plugin using it (?) If so, which?

https://github.com/Rasbats/aisMET_HYDRO_pi/
I needed the option to make the waypoint name invisible.
It builds. So does does survey_pi which I also found by coincidence. Will update opencpn-libs/api-17, hopefully without breaking any eggs.
